task.title: Progress Bar For Loading Overlay
task.goal: Replace startup numeric loading indicator with a progress bar and move it to an adaptive top-left position that avoids the search box
constraints: Do not add new module-boundary violations
success_criteria: Loading indicator becomes a progress bar
Top-left placement avoids search box overlap
